props.name: hint
props.description: Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: ```hint text as HTML``` Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text

props.name: legend
props.description: The legend of the component. Can be passed as a simple string or as a slot for HTML content.

props.name: hiddenlegend
props.description: Determines whether the legend is visually hidden.
